title: Fungi Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: An addon mod for Farmer's Delight that expand it with a variety of new mushrooms, features and food.
body: *** # **📜 About** **Fungi Delight** is an add-on for **Farmer's Delight** that introduces a variety of new mushrooms, features, mob interactions and dishes to the game. *** # 🍄**Features** * Adds **3 new mushrooms:** * **Inky Caps:** Can be found in small patches around the world, more common in mushroom fields, swamps, and birch forests. Can be a great alternative way of acquiring ink. * **Morels:** Can be found in small patches around the world, more common in mushroom fields, coniferous biomes, and dark forests. * **Truffles:** A high-value and rare mushroom that spawns like ores in the dirt layer inside small rooted dirt patches. More common in dark forests and taiga biomes. No surface clues, so you gotta use your dogs for that. * **Each mushroom has a huge variant and can be grown into colonies (farmable), except for truffles.** * **Two new mooshrooms: Inky Cap Mooshroom and Morel Mooshroom** * **New mob effect: Burrowing** * The potion can be brewed using the new mushroom: Truffle. undefined * A new status effect that increases mining speed on shovel-compatible blocks (Dirt, Sand, Gravel, etc.). * **New mob effect: Weak Stomach** * This effect is obtained by consuming foods containing **Coprine** (such as Inky Cap dishes), or any food that would stop alcohol digestion. * While active, the player develops a temporary intolerance to alcohol and potions.(or configurable items) * Consuming any during this time will trigger a violent reaction (Nausea, Poison, and Weakness). # 🐷**Mechanics** * **New Dog Feature: Truffle hunt**  * **Right-click** your **dog** with a **Truffle** for it to enter **"Truffle hunt mode"** for **2 minutes.** During that, your dog will emit **mycelium particles as an indicator** and start detecting **hidden truffle ores in a 12 block radius, 4 blocks deep.** * Once it detects something, **it will growl, run toward the surface, and start howling and digging as a sign for the player to start digging for it.** * The mode ends once it finds something or when the timer runs out. * **New Pig Feature: Truffle digging** * **Pigs** can now randomly **(0.00025 chance every tick)** start **digging** a defined set of blocks **(Podzol, Mud, Rooted Dirt, and Truffle Ores).** * **A pig will squeal happily** when it **decides to dig out** the ground for something, **run** to the said block, and start **digging**, turning it into **Coarse Dirt.** * **Pigs** can dig out the following items: * **Sticks (weight 35), Bone meal (weight 30), Clay ball (weight 20), Truffles (weight 10, guaranteed if the block was truffle ore).** * **Why these new mechanics and Truffles this hard to find?** * **Truffles** are a high-valued item that can be used for different purposes. They can be **traded highly** with villagers, used in **high-tier dishes**, **pacify Hoglins**, act as a **food source for Piglins and sniffers**. * Additionaly, breeding **Pigs** with **Truffles** now has a chance to produce **twins or triplets**, helping you expand your farm faster. 🔧 The mod is also fully compatible with **Botany**, **Create**, **CreateAdditions**, **Diet**, and **Serene Seasons** **(and a lot of other mods)** **Use JEI** and **Appleskin** for a better experience. *** #  **☕ Support me on Ko-Fi**❤️[Ko-fi.com/eggmain] # **(https://ko-fi.com/eggmain)** *** # **🔒 Permissions** **Modpacks:** You are welcome to include **Fungi Delight** in any public or private modpack. Please provide credit and a link back to the mod’s official page. **Modifications:** You may create addons or modifications to **Fungi Delight** as long as they are non-commercial and credit the original mod. If you plan to distribute modified versions, please ensure they are clearly labeled as unofficial. **Commercial Use:** **Fungi Delight** is not to be used for commercial purposes. This includes selling the mod, offering it as part of a paid service, or using it in monetized content without permission. **Attribution:** If you feature **Fungi Delight** in videos, streams, or other content, please provide proper attribution with a link to the mod’s official page. Feel free to suggest new ideas or report any bugs on the GitHub repository, or contact me directly.
